stb_image.h is imported from https://github.com/nothings/stb.

stb is available under either the MIT license or the public domain/unlicense option;
see the license block at the end of stb_image.h.

CLeonOS builds it through cleonos/c/apps/stb/stb_image_cleonos.c with stdio,
HDR/linear, PNG, PSD, PIC, PNM, and SIMD disabled for the freestanding userland.
